subject: A wide river winds through a verdant valley of rolling green hills under a luminous sky with sunbeams breaking through scattered clouds.
description: A bright pastoral landscape: a broad river snakes from the foreground into the deep middle distance, threading between layered green hills and small wooded outcrops. The water is calm and reflective, picking up the pale blue of the sky and the white of the clouds. Above the horizon, sunbeams fan downward through a cloud break, throwing soft rays across the valley. The palette is dominated by saturated greens, sky blues, and warm whites, with no visible figures or architecture. The mood is open, serene, and idyllic — a classic basic land vista.
foreground: river surface and grassy banks with low vegetation
background: rolling hills receding to a distant horizon under a bright cloud-broken sky
